name: supermaestro
description: Requirement intake and mission-control workflow suite for turning PRD, API, and Lanhu UI materials into reviewable Codex workbenches.

interface.shortDescription: 需求物料生成与任务编排工作台
interface.longDescription: SuperMaestro packages a requirement intake workflow for Codex: export Lanhu UI schema materials, structure PRDs into traceable facts, and use mission-control to create source/workbench folders, Gate briefs, review packs, and validation records for medium or large software requirements.
defaultPrompt: 使用 $requirement-workbench 接收这个需求，生成 source 物料和 mission-control workbench，先停在 Gate 1。
使用 $mission-control 处理这个需求，先规划并生成 review pack。
使用 $lanhu-export 从蓝湖链接导出 schema-only UI 物料。
